title: polypodium urophyllum
intro: Polypodium urophyllum, also known as the 'Umbrella fern' or 'Himalayan polypody', is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Polypodium urophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polypodium urophyllum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
